join_order.notes: c_custkey in [1,1500000] is dense; flat bitmap 1.5M/8 = 187KB fits L2 cache. Load c_mktsegment_dict.txt at runtime (C2) to find building_code. Set bit for each qualifying c_custkey.

join_order.build: orders(filtered: o_orderdate<1995-03-15 AND o_custkey in customer_bitmap)
join_order.notes: Runtime compact HT over ~1.455M qualifying orders (not pre-built 256MB index). Probe-aggregate fusion (P33): embed long double revenue accumulator directly in HT slots. Zone-map skip on o_orderdate_zone_map: skip block b if blocks[b].mn >= date_threshold. Build with CAS-based parallel insert (P34).

slot_fields.revenue: long double[4194304] with CAS-based atomic accumulation (64MB)

orders_fused_ht.sentinel_init: std::fill keys with INT32_MIN (C20, NEVER memset)

data_structures.aggregation: fused_into_orders_fused_ht (probe-aggregate fusion P33, no separate aggregation phase)

phase_parallelism.customer_scan: sequential (1.5M rows, fast, build bitmap before orders scan)
phase_parallelism.orders_build: parallel_omp_cas_insert (morsel-driven, 64 threads, atomic CAS on keys for concurrent HT construction)
phase_parallelism.lineitem_scan: parallel_omp (morsel-driven, 64 threads, each thread: zone-map skip, shipdate filter, probe fused HT, CAS-accumulate long double revenue)

indexes.skip_condition: blocks[b].mn >= date_threshold (all rows in block fail o_orderdate < threshold)
blocks[b].mx <= ship_threshold (all rows in block fail l_shipdate > threshold)

date_handling.note: Same threshold value used for both filters

revenue_accumulation.rule: C35: multi-column derived expression must use long double, NOT int64_t cents (C29 does not apply)

group_by_key.note: C15: ALL three GROUP BY columns embedded in fused HT slot. l_orderkey is the HT lookup key; o_orderdate and o_shippriority stored as payload fields written at build time.

output.strategy: partial_sort or priority_queue over fused HT entries where keys[i] != INT32_MIN
output.tiebreaker: o_orderdate ASC serves as stable secondary key (C33)
